rows.notes: H37 should remain docs-only, preserve H36 as the routing top, and select keep_h36_freeze rather than reopen by momentum.

The keep-freeze choice is only justified if F15 preserves the same narrow goal stack, F14 limits the threat set to two families, P25 stays operational-only, and the saved R41 design still requires later explicit authorization.
H37 should sit on the landed H36/R40 pair and keep R41 deferred without reopening blocked same-endpoint, scope-lift, or frontier lanes.
